interactive.rationale: 10 interactive controls wired to script logic — well past the static-card threshold.

references.rationale: Page cites chromestatus.com/feature/5074311432437760 but the feature's canonical id is 5155252832305152. This breaks the self-heal anchor (CLAUDE.md rule #3) and misleads readers.

design_system.rationale: Inline styles route through --bg/--text/--accent variables, no raw hex, and button overrides pair background + color correctly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept's lede mirrors the feature index promise — same nouns, same scope.

spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the keywords the spec/feature-index lede surfaces — covers the headline API surface.

edge_cases.rationale: Page surfaces failure modes (unsupported, rejected, error paths) alongside the happy path.

openQuestions.title: Fix the chromestatus id link
openQuestions.detail: Replace the citation of chromestatus.com/feature/5074311432437760 with chromestatus.com/feature/5155252832305152. The wrong id will trip the self-heal script and point readers at an unrelated feature.

summary: Mostly solid but with one structural gap (fail on the rubric). The major open question is the priority fix.
